title: juncus bulbosus
intro: Juncus bulbosus, also known as the bulbous rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Juncus bulbosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate gastrointestinal problems, and support the immune system. Juncus bulbosus can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
